name: Feature request

labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

### Summary
A clear and concise description of what the feature or improvement is.

### Problem or Motivation
Describe the problem or use case that this feature addresses.

**Current Behavior:**
A description of the current behavior and why it is problematic.

**Desired Behavior:**
A description of what you would like to happen instead.

## Use Cases

### Primary Use Case
Describe the primary use case for this feature.

### Additional Use Cases

1. [Use case 1]
2. [Use case 2]
3. [Use case 3]

### Approach
Describe the proposed approach to implement this feature.

<!-- Describe the architecture or design approach -->

- [ ] Yes, new endpoints

- [ ] No API changes

## Priority

- [ ] Critical (blocks major functionality)
- [ ] High (important feature)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)
- [ ] Low (trivial enhancement)

## Effort Estimate

- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1-3 days)
- [ ] Large (1 week)
- [ ] X-Large (> 1 week)

## Testing Plan

Describe how this feature will be tested:

1. Unit tests for new components
2. Integration tests for API endpoints
3. Manual testing scenarios

## Documentation

Will this feature require documentation updates?
- [ ] Yes
- [ ] No
